Nav.signInHint: Sign in to view orders and project BOMs.

Login.title: Enterprise Member Sign In
Login.subtitle: Enter your username and password.
Login.memberHint: Sign in with an enterprise member account to enter its procurement workspace.

roleHint.admin: Customer-company admin who manages members and approves orders.
roleHint.buyer: Customer-company procurement owner responsible for payment, invoices, and order progress.
roleHint.engineer: Customer-company solution engineer responsible for selection, carting, and BOM handoff.

boundary.enterpriseBody: Accounts belong to customer companies, not HITBOT internal admin users.
boundary.noPublicBody: Accounts are opened after confirmation with the company contact and account manager.
boundary.backendBody: Sign-in, SMS, permissions, and review follow the enterprise account system.

Products.title: Products
Products.selectionSubtitle: Filter by category and key parameters, then open the exact SKU for details and ordering.
Products.linkedFiltersHint: Only parameters available in this category are shown.
Products.chooseCategoryHint: Choose a product category first to avoid invalid parameter mixes.

Product.signInRequired: Enter an enterprise account before adding to the project BOM.
Product.compatibleAccessoriesHint: Recommended from common mounting relationships so the team can build a complete project BOM.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.osSyncHint: OS project BOM items sync into the same cart.
Cart.syncHint: Cart data is organized by project so the website and OS work against the same project BOM.

Checkout.title: Confirm Project BOM
Checkout.subtitle: This is where web cart items and OS-generated BOM items meet. Engineers hand off to procurement; procurement submissions go to enterprise admin approval.
Checkout.flowHint: Review the BOM, delivery, payment and invoice details in order, then submit.
Checkout.deliveryStepHint: Use a saved address or enter the delivery contact and destination for this project.
Checkout.paymentStepHint: Confirm payment method, approval route, and enterprise invoice information.
Checkout.submitStepHint: Check the amount, account, and next action before sending it into Orders.
Checkout.procurementHint: Reuse company address book and invoice profiles to reduce repeated entry.
Checkout.engineerBoundaryTitle: Engineers submit the project BOM only
Checkout.engineerBoundaryHint: This role does not enter payment, invoice details, or create orders. Procurement details stay visible as context; the procurement owner continues checkout.
Checkout.addressBookHint: Reuse common delivery addresses for repeat procurement.
Checkout.invoiceProfilesHint: Reuse corporate invoice title, tax ID, and bank account.
Checkout.approvalSubmitSuccess: Order submitted for enterprise admin approval
Checkout.readyHint: All required details are complete. Submitting creates a project order.
Checkout.missingHint: Complete shipping or invoice details before submitting.
Checkout.engineerReadyHint: The project BOM is ready. Submitting creates a handoff message in Account for procurement continuation.
Checkout.engineerMissingHint: The project BOM is empty. Add items from products or import an OS project first.
Checkout.signInHint: Enter an enterprise account before submitting the project BOM.
Checkout.osHandoffLoginHint: An OS project BOM was detected. Sign in with a customer-company member account before importing it into the correct enterprise.
Checkout.cashierApprovalHint: This order is still under approval and enters payment only after approval.
Checkout.cashierCorporateHint: Complete the corporate transfer for this amount and keep the payment voucher.
Checkout.cashierPersonalHint: Complete payment for the order amount.
Checkout.cashierPaidHint: Payment is confirmed. Follow-up status will be synced from the connected system.
Checkout.handoffSubmittedHint: Current status: {status}. Engineers do not directly create orders or pay.
Checkout.loginRequired: Real checkout requires an enterprise account. Engineers submit the BOM; procurement completes checkout on the website.

Account.title: Enterprise Account
Account.subtitle: Enterprise members manage project BOMs, orders, and company information here.
Account.adminDesc: Manage company profile, child accounts, project BOMs, and order permissions.
Account.buyerDesc: Confirm project BOMs, provide address, payment, invoice details, and complete checkout.
Account.engineerDesc: Design in OS, generate BOMs, and hand purchases over to procurement.

admin.title: Enterprise Admin Workspace
admin.body: For customer-company account and order collaboration, not HITBOT internal administration.
admin.task2: Approve orders submitted by engineers or procurement
admin.task3: View enterprise orders, OS project BOMs, and quote-needed items
admin.limit1: Does not manage HITBOT product publishing or stock
admin.limit2: Does not manage HITBOT internal system permissions
admin.action: Confirm company profile and member accounts, then handle pending approvals.

buyer.title: Procurement Workspace
buyer.body: Turns engineer-submitted BOMs into orders and completes payment and invoice details.
buyer.task1: Review project BOMs and delivery details
buyer.task2: Provide payment method, invoice title, and tax ID
buyer.task3: Confirm payment and track follow-up order status
buyer.limit2: Cannot operate HITBOT internal production or shipping workflows
buyer.action: Start with pending-payment or pending-review orders.

engineer.title: Solution Engineer Workspace
engineer.body: For precise selection, carting, and BOM handoff without direct payment.
engineer.task1: Select products precisely from the product list and add them to project BOMs
engineer.task2: Generate project BOMs from OS and hand them to procurement
engineer.task3: Track approval and follow-up status for submitted orders
engineer.limit2: Cannot advance production, shipping, or completion states
engineer.action: Finish selection or OS BOM work, then submit it to procurement.

Account.sessionHint: Sign in with an enterprise member account before viewing company project data.
Account.sessionActiveHint: Navigation, checkout, and order records now follow the current role. Signing out will require account entry again.
Account.overviewProjectActionsEmpty: No pending approvals, payments, OS BOMs, or quote-needed items
Account.overviewInvoiceProfilesHint: Maintain common invoice profiles for checkout reuse
Account.overviewInvoiceProfilesReadonly: The current role can view invoice profiles during checkout
Account.overviewOrdersEmpty: No orders waiting for quote, approval, or payment
Account.overviewHandoffsEmpty: No OS BOMs waiting for handoff
Account.overviewQuotesEmpty: No quotes waiting for pricing or confirmation
Account.memberAccountsHint: Create enterprise member accounts and assign order, invoice, and member-management permissions by position.
Account.settingsAdminHint: Create enterprise member accounts and configure position names and collaboration permissions.
Account.memberRoleNamePlaceholder: e.g. Procurement Lead, Project Manager, Automation Engineer
Account.invoicesHint: Maintain common invoice titles, tax IDs, and bank accounts for the enterprise.
Account.invoiceHistoryHint: Built from invoice snapshots and payment references on orders. Real invoice status will be synced from the connected system later.
Account.noInvoiceHistory: No invoice history yet. Orders with invoice information will appear here.
Account.noOrdersHint: After a project BOM is submitted from the cart, this area tracks approval, payment, and order status by project.
Account.handoffHint: BOMs submitted from OS appear as project actions for procurement to confirm and checkout on the website.
Account.noHandoffsHint: Entering from the OS cart or checkout handoff records project BOMs here for procurement continuation.
Account.quotesHint: Custom BOM lines are shown as items waiting for confirmation; final pricing is handed off to the existing system later.
Account.noQuotesHint: Select a custom line from an OS BOM and submit it to create a quote request.
Account.ordersHint: Track website product orders, OS project BOMs, and quote-needed items by source. Procurement handles checkout, admins approve, and engineers can view only.
Account.actionQueueHint: Approval and payment tasks are grouped here instead of being buried in the order list.
Account.noFilteredOrdersHint: Switch status or project filters to view other submissions.
Account.noSnapshot: This older local order has no saved detail snapshot
Account.noInvoice: No invoice selected or personal payment
Account.accessRequestHint: Submit company and contact details so the account manager can open the enterprise account and configure members.
Account.accessIntentPlaceholder: Example: purchasing Z-Arm and grippers for an automation line with OS project BOM handoff.
Account.accessApprovedHint: Enterprise ID {enterpriseId} is opened. Use the new enterprise admin member account below.

Orders.title: Orders
Orders.subtitle: Review website product orders and Hitbot OS sourced orders after checkout, including approval, payment, and follow-up status. Orders are scoped to the active enterprise account; procurement handles checkout, admins approve, and engineers can view progress.
Orders.detailSubtitle: Review one order's status, BOM, delivery, invoice, payment, and follow-up information.
Orders.authTitle: Enter an enterprise account to view orders
Orders.authHint: Orders belong to enterprise project data. Enter the workspace before reviewing approval, payment, and production progress.
Orders.notFoundHint: Order {orderNo} does not exist or does not belong to the active enterprise account.
Orders.workspaceHint: {company} is viewing orders as {role}. This page receives submissions created from website checkout and OS project BOMs.
Orders.emptyHint: Orders generated from cart checkout or OS project BOMs will appear here with approval, payment, and follow-up status.
Orders.completedHint: {count} completed orders remain available in history.

Trial.title: Try OS Online
Trial.subtitle: Enter a phone number to create a non-persistent local trial project and open a guided, read-only OS preview. Exiting clears the project state immediately.
Trial.phoneHint: This local trial account does not send SMS or call backend services; reloading will not restore the fake project.
Trial.trialClearedHint: Local state for {project} was removed. Starting again creates a fresh fake project.
Trial.readonly: The device library is mostly read-only, with a small guided drag-and-drop interaction.
Trial.fakeProject: Uses a fake project and mock data; state is cleared after exit.
Trial.disabledActions: Admin, real cart, upload, and download actions are visible but disabled.
Trial.libraryHint: The trial library is read-only. Only the first device can be dragged.
Trial.statusHint: This step allows dragging the end-effector in the scene and watching the position update.
Trial.sceneLockedHint: This step is read-only. Enter “Drag device” before moving the model.
Trial.disabledExplain: Upload, download, real robot run, admin, and real cart actions are visible but never executed in trial mode.

stepHint.overview: This is the lightweight OS trial workspace, preserving the navigation and status semantics of the real OS.
stepHint.library: The left device library shows available devices, but trial mode does not write to a real project.
stepHint.scene: Drag the gray end-effector in the 3D scene to try the smallest interaction loop.
stepHint.handoff: In the real flow, engineers generate a BOM and hand it off to procurement for website checkout.

DesignSystem.title: Design Tokens
DesignSystem.subtitle: Unified token and component library for storefront, OS embedding, account, and order workspaces.

Footer.addressValue: Building E, 2F, Huafeng International Robotics Park, Hangcheng Ave, Bao'an, Shenzhen
